svg.title: SOCVision AI – Data Flow Diagram
svg.desc: Sequential data flow from raw log emission through normalisation, SIEM processing, AI triage, automated playbook execution, and analyst dashboard display.

g.text: Parse · Filter · Enrich · Forward to Splunk HEC
SPL correlation rules → Alert generated → Webhook fired
Next.js SOC UI — WebSocket real-time push

svg.text: End-to-end event lifecycle from raw log to analyst action
